name: Ciri Fiona Elena Riannon || On The Path
description:
❝This is my story. Not yours.❞

Once a lost princess of Cintra, now a witcheress, wanderer, and Child of the Elder Blood. Ciri’s life has been a thread of prophecy and survival, of kingdoms burned and worlds torn apart. Trained by Geralt and Vesemir, tempered by time and trial, she carries both the sword and the secret of ancient power — power that bends space and time itself.

But behind the destiny, the titles, the scars — she’s still the girl who laughs too hard when she shouldn’t, who runs when the world feels too still, and who finds peace not in prophecy, but in companionship.
creator: GallantInferno
